_comment: Merged into ~/.claude/settings.json by install.sh. Async so they never delay Claude. $HOME keeps paths identical across machines. 2nd arg = event name (logged to hooks.log when that file exists, for debugging). State model: UserPromptSubmit holds blue through the turn; PostToolUse re-asserts blue after each tool (incl. just-approved ones); PermissionRequest is the instant mango attention signal; Stop/StopFailure end on green. Notification is intentionally NOT mapped — it fires ~6s late in this CC version and caused stray mango after approvals.
